idea: Redis처럼 TTL과 LRU eviction을 지원하는 embeddable in-memory cache library를 만들고 싶다.
summary: 사용자는 Redis의 일부 캐시 동작처럼 TTL 만료와 LRU 기반 eviction을 제공하는 embeddable in-memory cache library를 만들고 싶어 한다.
known_facts: The product is a library, not an end-user application.
The library should support TTL expiration.
The library should support LRU eviction.
The user wants Redis-like behavior as a reference point.

assumptions.statement: The first version can be single-process and in-memory only.
A small, predictable API is more important than matching every Redis command.

clarifying_questions.question: Which runtime or language should the cache library target first?
clarifying_questions.why_it_matters: The runtime determines packaging, concurrency assumptions, timers, and test harness.

clarifying_questions.question: Should Redis-like mean API compatibility, behavior similarity, or only conceptual similarity?
clarifying_questions.why_it_matters: API compatibility would dramatically expand scope and acceptance tests.

needs_user_decision.question: Which runtime should v1 target?

options.label: TypeScript/Node.js
options.description: Ship as an npm package with TypeScript types.

options.label: Python
options.description: Ship as a PyPI package with Pythonic cache APIs.

needs_user_decision.impact: Determines package format, timer behavior, public API shape, and test tooling.

needs_user_decision.question: Should v1 include network server or distributed behavior?

options.label: Single process only
options.description: Embeddable in-memory cache with no network server.

options.label: Network server
options.description: Expose Redis-like operations over a socket or HTTP boundary.

needs_user_decision.impact: Networked behavior changes architecture, durability expectations, and task graph size.

needs_user_decision.question: What should v1 optimize for?

options.label: Simple and deterministic
options.description: Prioritize correctness, deterministic tests, and clear APIs.

options.label: Maximum throughput
options.description: Prioritize benchmark performance and advanced data structures.

needs_user_decision.impact: Determines acceptance criteria and whether benchmark tasks are blocking.

evidence.title: Original product idea
evidence.used_for: Identified TTL, LRU eviction, and Redis-like cache intent.

evidence.title: Redis key expiration and eviction behavior reference
evidence.used_for: Grounded the distinction between conceptual Redis-like behavior and full API/server compatibility.
